{{Quote|The bravery of my operatives cannot be measured, Skywalker. They are the very lifeblood of our rebellion.|Tungo to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="Rebellion 2">[[Rebellion 2|''Rebellion'' 2]]</ref>}}
'''Tungo Li''' was the head of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] network in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. He was small with large pointed [[Ear/Legends|ears]], a tail, and brown fur on his arms and back.

==Biography==
Li controlled a network of [[Spy/Legends|spies]] spread throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] working undercover within other information networks. In communication with them, he wore a large silver helmet which interfaced with [[Computer/Legends|computer]] networks. One of his spies, [[Wyl Tarson]], intercepted the message from [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber]] to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] which initiated an elaborate trap which [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] had set for the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]].

He was killed when he [[Self-destruct mechanism/Legends|self-destructed]] the ''[[Rebel One]]'' as part of the [[Attack on Bannistar Station]].
